level.instructions: Reverse the train from 1,2,3,4 to 4,3,2,1. Challenge is to have the final train at the stop sign be all one color. (Don't have a way to check for that yet so there's no 'won' state for this.
level.thoughts: Seems to need a seperate cons cell/path for each cons but I don't mind it. It's a fun puzzle. Some puzzles are good when elegant, some are good when they take a lot of track.
